banner.title: AFTER THE GAME
banner.description: A new initiative for transitioning athletes.

atg.description: A national, cohort-based workforce program for transitioning or recently-retired professional and NCAA student-athletes. Explicitly designed for those who are not long-term earners and need structured support to design and enter a second career.
atg.videoDescription: Hear directly from athletes who are building their next chapter through After The Game. The transition doesn't have to be a solo journey.

features.title: Cohort-Based
features.description: Learn alongside fellow athletes who understand the transition. No solo online courses — real accountability, real peers.

features.title: Career Design
features.description: Not just job skills — a structured path to discover, plan, and launch your second career with wraparound support.

features.title: Live Instruction
features.description: Technical leads teaching live classes, not pre-recorded videos. Real questions, real feedback, real progress.

features.title: Job Placement
features.description: From corporate readiness to interview prep to direct employer connections. We don't stop at the certificate.

features.title: Digital Skills
features.description: Bridge the digital skill divide with practical tech training — from digital fluency to data, automation, and AI.

features.title: National Reach
features.description: Designed to serve athletes across the country. Your city, your schedule, your next chapter.

atg.formDescription: The next cohort starts summer 2026. Sign up now to reserve your spot and get updates on enrollment.
atg.successMessage: We'll be in touch when enrollment opens.
